top3.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM Match m
JOIN League l ON m.league_id = l.id
WHERE l.name = 'Belgium Jupiler League' 
  AND m.date >= '2009-04-01' 
  AND m.date <= '2009-04-30';

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM Match m
JOIN League l ON m.league_id = l.id
JOIN Country c ON m.country_id = c.id
WHERE c.name = 'Belgium' 
  AND l.name = 'Jupiler League' 
  AND m.date >= '2009-04-01' 
  AND m.date <= '2009-04-30';

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM Match m
JOIN League l ON m.league_id = l.id
WHERE l.name = 'Belgium Jupiler League' 
  AND m.date >= '2009-04-01' 
  AND m.date <= '2009-04-30';

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM Match m
JOIN League l ON m.league_id = l.id
JOIN Country c ON m.country_id = c.id
WHERE c.name = 'Belgium' 
  AND l.name = 'Jupiler League' 
  AND strftime('%Y-%m', m.date) = '2009-04';

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM Match m
JOIN League l ON m.league_id = l.id
JOIN Country c ON m.country_id = c.id
WHERE c.name = 'Belgium' 
  AND l.name = 'Jupiler League' 
  AND m.date >= '2009-04-01' 
  AND m.date <= '2009-04-30';

FROM Match m

  AND m.date >= '2009-04-01' 
  AND m.date <= '2009-04-30';

WHERE c.name = 'Belgium' 
  AND l.name = 'Jupiler League'

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM Match m

JOIN Country c ON m.country_id = c.id
WHERE c.name = 'Belgium' 
  AND l.name = 'Jupiler League'

  AND m.date <= '2009-04-30';

final.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM Match m
JOIN League l ON m.league_id = l.id
WHERE l.name = 'Belgium Jupiler League' 
  AND m.date >= '2009-04-01' 
  AND m.date <= '2009-04-30';
